sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109169" key="u(pospai/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσπαίρω</orth>, <sense id="n109169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gasp</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">struggle,</tr_> esp. in death, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; of hysterical respiration, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀτάκτως ὑ.</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw short and irregular breaths,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.71</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
